name: Command A+
metaDescription: Command A+ (Cohere), released 2026-05-20 — part of the Command A+ line. First Apache-2.0 Command frontier model; sparse MoE (218B total / 25B active), 128K con…
overview: Command A+ is a large language model from Cohere, part of the Command A+ line. Released 2026-05-20. Cohere's flagship Mixture-of-Experts model unifying reasoning, vision, and agentic tool use.
What's notable in this version: First Apache-2.0 Command frontier model; sparse MoE (218B total / 25B active), 128K context, vision + reasoning + tool use, 48 languages, runs on 1x B200 or 2x H100.
